## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run test` passes locally
- [ ] Frontmatter is complete (title, slug, category, description, syntax, returnType, returnDescription, parameters, compatibility, relatedFunctions)
- [ ] Slug exists in the [official M spec](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powerquery-m/power-query-m-function-reference) (the spec validation test will catch this)
- [ ] Examples use the shared sample tables where applicable (Sales, Customers, Products, Employees, OrderLog)
- [ ] `<!--output ... -->` JSON is present on non-connector function examples
